title: Save Command, Project Menu
description:
Save Command, Project Menu

Save Command (Project Menu)

This command saves the active program file, include file, point file, force file, I/O label, or user errors. This menu selection will be dimmed if nothing needs to be saved.

TIP: It's a good idea to save files frequently while you are editing project files. Just click the [Save all files]  button on the toolbar to save all of your files.
